_doc: Golden set for the router agent. Covers the intents currently shipped on master: READ_ANALYTICS, REGISTER_SALE/EXPENSE/PRODUCT, ADD_STOCK, DEACTIVATE_PRODUCT, CANCEL_*, MIXED, GREETING, AMBIGUOUS. Future intents (REGISTER_PRODUCT_WITH_STOCK, DECLINE_PRODUCT_CREATION, UPDATE_PRODUCT_PRICE) live behind unmerged feature branches; their golden cases (and their tests/eval/router_propose_confirm.json file) ship with the same PR that lands the feature in agents/router.py. The runner skips missing golden files with a warning. Run with: python tests/eval/router/run_eval.py — requires GOOGLE_API_KEY and forces GEMINI_TEMPERATURE=0 for determinism.

cases.input: Mensaje actual: cuantas pulseras tengo?
Mensaje actual: what's my total revenue this month?
Mensaje actual: como viene la ganancia este mes?
Mensaje actual: vendi 2 pulseras negras
Mensaje actual: registrame una venta de 3 pulseras a 10 dolares
Mensaje actual: gaste 30 dolares en envios
Mensaje actual: registrar gasto de 50 dolares en publicidad
Mensaje actual: crear producto Pulseras Verdes, el precio es de $10

cases._note: Keyword 'nuevas' must route to REGISTER_PRODUCT, not ADD_STOCK, even with a quantity-like context.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: agrego unas nuevas pulseras arcoiris
Mensaje actual: agrego 10 pulseras negras
Mensaje actual: entraron 400 clasicas y 200 doradas
Mensaje actual: elimina las pulseras viejas
Mensaje actual: cancela la ultima venta
Mensaje actual: anula la ultima operacion
Mensaje actual: hola!

cases._note: Bare 'registrar algo' lacks a target — should classify as AMBIGUOUS or fall to low-confidence (which the router maps to AMBIGUOUS).
cases.input: Mensaje actual: registrar algo

cases._note: ES/EN code-switch in a single sentence. Router should still pick REGISTER_SALE.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: I sold 4 pulseras negras hoy

cases._note: Argentine informal phrasing far from the prompt's ES examples. No 'cuanto/cuantos' keyword.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: che, queda algo de las arcoiris?

cases._note: Action plus follow-up question in one message. Router contract says MIXED.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: vendi 2 pulseras negras, cuanto stock me queda?

cases._note: Greeting prefix should not swallow the actionable WRITE intent that follows. Router currently classifies as MIXED with sale entities; we assert intent_not GREETING + entities to lock in the entity extraction.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: hola! vendi 3 pulseras negras

cases._note: AR slang 'le chute' = 'gaste'. Not in prompt vocabulary. Lock amount only; description and date are free-form and may churn.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: le chute 50 dolares al envio de ayer

cases._note: AR slang 'metele N al stock'. Not in prompt vocabulary, no 'agregar/anadir' verb.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: metele 30 manzanas al stock

cases._note: 'compre' (I bought) is an expense from the business's perspective, not a sale. Easy to misclassify as REGISTER_SALE because of the product noun. Bar: must NOT be REGISTER_SALE; lock amount.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: compre 100 pulseras de proveedor por 200 dolares

cases._note: Bare '200' without any prior assistant turn asking for a price. Must NOT classify as UPDATE_PRODUCT_PRICE.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: 200

cases._note: Cancel referenced by a date/description, not 'last/ultima'. Lock product_ref. Date is normalized to English ('yesterday') by the router — left open because that normalization may evolve.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: anulame la venta de las pulseras doradas de ayer

cases._note: Imperative phrasing ('mostrame', 'dame') is a read query, not a write op. Easy to mis-route as WRITE because of the verb.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: dame el revenue de la semana pasada

cases._note: Phrasing without 'crear/nuevo/nueva' keyword. Tests whether the router relies on keyword matching vs semantic understanding.
cases.input: Mensaje actual: sumame al catalogo unas pulseras turquesas a 15 dolares
